original_hypothesis.title: AgentMigrator Reset Enables Duplicate Migration Stranding Old Stakers
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: AgentMigrator.reset() allows the owner to set migratedAgents[id] = false, enabling re-migration of the same agent. Re-migration creates new token, DAO, veToken, and LP infrastructure, with migrateVirtual overwriting the agent's virtualInfo to point to new contracts. Old veToken stakers are stranded with tokens pointing to an orphaned DAO.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: reset() combined with migrateAgent() allows creating duplicate infrastructure. The old veToken contract still holds LP tokens and stakers' deposits, but the agent's DAO reference is overwritten, disconnecting old governance from the agent.

proof_of_signal.pattern: migratedAgents[id] = false in reset(); migrateAgent only checks !migratedAgents[id]; migrateVirtual overwrites DAO/token/LP/veToken

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: reset sets migratedAgents[id] = false enabling re-migration
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: migrateVirtual overwrites agent infrastructure references; old stakers' veTokens become orphaned
initial_code_evidence.missing_safeguards: No check for active stakers in old veToken before allowing re-migration

analysis_questions: Do old veToken stakers lose access to their LP tokens?
Can the old veToken still function (withdraw) after migration?
Is reset() intended for error recovery only?
validation_requirements: Migrate, reset, re-migrate; verify old veToken stakers can still withdraw LP
Verify old DAO becomes disconnected from agent
Test founder getting double LP staking

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Owner resets migration. Founder (or colluding owner+founder) re-migrates, getting fresh LP staked in new veToken while old stakers hold orphaned veTokens. Agent governance moves to new DAO controlled by founder.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Old stakers lose governance power; founder gains double initial LP position
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All stakers of the original veToken
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Old stakers can still withdraw LP from old veToken contract directly

technical_investigation_focus.detection_analysis: AgentMigrated event emitted twice for same ID

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
